channel.title: personal on Bhumish's Blog :tada:
channel.description: Recent content in personal on Bhumish's Blog :tada:

item.title: Set-up Penetration Testing server on AWS
item.description: Story of how I hosted the Android’s AppInventor project on a Google AppEngine

item.title: Never Post A Picture Of Your Boarding Pass On Social Media
item.description: Posting your boarding pass on social media may seem like a cool thing to do, but here are a ton of reasons why you shouldn’t.

item.title: A Trip to Bhuigaon Beach
item.description: I visited a beach in Vasai - Bhuigaon, and this post describes my trip with some photos

item.title: Cycling trip to Padle Village - Part II
item.description: Second part of my visit to a nearby village on my MTB. This post has some photos of my trip.

item.title: Cycling trip to Padle Village
item.description: I visited a nearby village on my MTB. This post has some photos of my trip.

item.title: A Quick Recap
item.description: Was away from the blog. What was I doing?

item.title: Life, at Gandhinagar
item.description: Moved away from home, for pursuing my Masters in Network Security

item.description: An update on my ongoing college project
